title: rosa × noisettiana f. manettii
intro: Rosa × noisettiana f. manettii, also known as the Noisette rose, is a hybrid rose plant that has been bred from Rosa gallica and Rosa moschata. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Rosa × noisettiana f. manettii include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the rose petals are often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to calm the skin and promote relaxation.
benefits: Rosa × noisettiana f. manettii has many benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, which can improve the quality of life for individuals suffering from arthritis, fibromyalgia, and other chronic conditions. This plant also exhibits antimicrobial properties, helping to combat infections and promote wound healing, making it an effective remedy for skin conditions like acne, eczema, and psoriasis. Additionally, the antioxidants present in Rosa × noisettiana f. manettii have been shown to protect against cell damage, potentially reducing the risk of cancer, heart disease, and neurodegenerative disorders, thereby enhancing overall health and well-being. By incorporating this plant into one's lifestyle, individuals can experience improved physical and mental health, leading to a more fulfilling and energetic life.
actions: Rosa × noisettiana f. manettii has many therapeutic actions, such as reducing inflammation and relieving pain, which can help individuals who suffer from arthritis or fibromyalgia to engage in daily activities like gardening or cooking without exacerbating their symptoms. This plant also exhibits antimicrobial properties, making it effective in wound healing and preventing infections, thereby facilitating quicker recovery for individuals who have undergone surgeries or injuries. Additionally, its antioxidant properties can help protect against cell damage, thereby reducing the risk of chronic diseases like cancer and heart disease, allowing people to live healthier and more active lives. By utilizing the therapeutic actions of Rosa × noisettiana f. manettii, individuals can improve their overall well-being and quality of life, enabling them to participate in activities they enjoy, such as hiking or spending time with loved ones.
constituents: Rosa × noisettiana f. manettii has many active constituents, such as flavonoids (quercetin, kaempferol), phenolic acids (gallic acid, ferulic acid), and phenolic glycosides (gallic acid glycoside, 3-O-β-D-glucopyranoside). These compounds possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can improve daily lives by reducing the risk of chronic diseases like heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer. The flavonoids in Rosa × noisettiana f. manettii also have been shown to have antiviral and anti-histaminic effects, which can alleviate symptoms of allergies and provide relief from common cold and flu. Furthermore, the antioxidant properties of phenolic acids and phenolic glycosides in this plant can help protect the skin from damage caused by UV radiation, promoting healthy aging and reducing the appearance of wrinkles.
